name: avito-clothing-monitor
description: Realtime designer resale crawler focused on fresh listings, recommendations, and operator-friendly source control.
author: Archive Finder Contributors

scripts.build: npm run build:shared && npm run build:server && npm run build:client
scripts.build:server: npm --workspace server run build && npm --workspace server run build:desktop-bundle
scripts.dev: npm run build:shared && concurrently -n server,client -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev:server" "npm run dev:client"
scripts.dev:server: sh -c 'npm run build:shared >/dev/null && if lsof -iTCP:4000 -sTCP:LISTEN >/dev/null 2>&1; then echo "server already running on :4000, reusing existing process"; else npm --workspace server run dev; fi'
scripts.desktop:dev: npm run build:shared && concurrently -n server,client,electron -c cyan,magenta,yellow "npm --workspace server run dev" "npm --workspace client run dev" "sh -c 'until curl -sf http://127.0.0.1:4000/api/health >/dev/null; do sleep 1; done; until curl -sf http://127.0.0.1:5173 >/dev/null; do sleep 1; done; electron .'"
scripts.desktop:build:mac: npm run desktop:build:icon && npm run build && electron-builder --mac dir --publish never
scripts.desktop:dist:mac: npm run desktop:build:icon && npm run build && electron-builder --mac --publish never
scripts.lint: npm run build:shared && npm run lint:workspaces
